title: Eli Lilly Hands China Rights for Breast Cancer Drug Verzenio to Innovent Biologics
summary: Shanghai: Eli Lilly has transferred the mainland China commercialization rights for its breast cancer drug Verzenios to Innovent Biologics, the Chinese drugmaker said Tuesday, as its U.S. partner...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Shanghai: Eli Lilly has transferred the mainland China commercialization rights for its breast cancer drug Verzenios to Innovent Biologics, the Chinese drugmaker said Tuesday, as its U.S. partner grapples with generic competition in the world's second-largest pharmaceutical ‚Äåmarket.

In ‚ÅÝa statement, ‚ÅÝInnovent said it entered into an agreement that grants it ‚Äãsole commercialization rights for Verzenios, which Lilly has also called Verzenio, in mainland ‚ÄãChina, adding that Lilly would continue manufacturing, supplying and developing the drug. Innovent's statement did not mention financial ‚Äãterms.

Lilly did not immediately respond ‚ÅÝto a ‚ÄåReuters request for comment on what would ‚Äãhappen to ‚Äãthe China sales team for Verzenio, a ‚ÅÝdrug it began supplying in China in 2021, ‚Äãaccording to a post on its official ‚ÄãWeChat account.

Lilly's pullback in a country where more than 350,000 patients are diagnosed with breast cancer annually follows local approval of a generic version from a unit of China's Qingfeng Pharmaceutical Group this year.

A spokesperson ‚Äåfor Innovent did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment on generic ‚Äãcompetition. In the ‚Äãfourth quarter of ‚ÅÝ2025, Verzenio revenue outside the U.S. was $608 million, Lilly said in February.

Lilly has never disclosed official Chinese sales figures, ‚Äãsaid Tony Ren, head of Asia healthcare research at Macquarie Capital. When a drug loses patent protection or exclusivity, many large pharmaceutical companies would try to offload it, Ren added.

Source : Reuters
